source_note: This demo uses anonymized mock OCR text reconstructed from public-style loyalty program screenshots.

records.extracted_content: Brand A Loyalty Program mini program membership benefits page
Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3, Tier 4, Tier 5, Tier 6
Basic Member, Blue Diamond, Star Diamond, Gold Diamond, Black Diamond, Platinum Diamond

Basic: registered but no full-size product purchase; Blue Diamond: purchased any full-size product; Star Diamond: single purchase ≥ ¥1,500 or annual cumulative spend ≥ ¥2,500; Gold Diamond: single or annual cumulative spend ≥ ¥5,000; Black Diamond: ≥ ¥10,000; Platinum Diamond: ≥ ¥25,000

All tiers receive birthday benefits; first purchase during birthday month earns double points up to 50,000 points; birthday benefit is based on the registered birthday; limited to once per year; expired benefits cannot be compensated
Premium salon service for selected high-tier members; luxury SPA service for selected upper-tier members in designated cities

Different point multipliers by tier; repeat purchase benefit for Tier 2 and above; counter visit benefit for Tier 2 and above; counter care service for Tier 2 and above; upgrade point gifts for Tier 3 and above

Membership validity lasts until the end of the 12th natural month from enrollment or upgrade; tier may be retained, upgraded, downgraded, or cross-adjusted based on spending before expiration; returns may adjust points and tier status
Members can upgrade when a single purchase or annual cumulative spending reaches the corresponding tier threshold
Upgrade to Tier 3/4/5/6 grants 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000 points respectively; points arrive on the third working day after upgrade; same-tier upgrade gift can only be received once within 12 months
Birthday month double points, upgrade bonus points, large-order point freeze mechanism, one-person-one-account rule, cross-channel points integration
Birthday Month Double Points; Upgrade Bonus Points; Large-order Point Freeze; One-person-one-account Rule; Cross-channel Points Integration
